productDisplayName: Vans Men Brown 106 Moc CA LNS Shoes
description: Brown, round toed shoes with central lace fastening Suede upper with stitched detail around the toe box style to give a moccasin type look, reinforced overlay at the heel collar EVA midsole with foxing around the toe box Vulcanised rubber signature waffle outsole with diamond shaped scooped out outsole
